groups.name: Input Stem
groups.description: Stem convolutions downsampling input image prior to multi-branch Inception blocks.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_0)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_1)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Inception Module A (mixed_2)
groups.description: Applies parallel multi-scale convolutions (1x1, 3x3, 5x5) and combines features.

groups.name: Global Pooling & Classification
groups.description: GAP followed by the dense classifier.
